---
title: "404 — Page Not Found"
---

<div style="text-align: center; padding: 2rem 0;">

# 🚧 🔍

**This page is still under construction — or you found a link that didn't work.** 😅

Either way, nothing to worry about! ✨

<br/>

```{=html}
<a id="home-btn" href="/" class="btn btn-primary">← Back to the Tutorial</a>
<script>
  (function () {
    var root;
    if (location.hostname.endsWith("github.io")) {
      var seg = location.pathname.split("/").filter(Boolean)[0];
      root = seg ? "/" + seg + "/" : "/";
    } else {
      root = "/";
    }
    document.getElementById("home-btn").href = root;
  })();
</script>
```

</div>
